name: Sugar Free Chocolate Banana Cream Pie-Peanut
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the peanut butter and honey together in a bowl.
2. Stir in the rice crispy pieces until combined.
3. Press the mixture into the bottom of a pie plate using a metal spoon, building up the edges slightly.
4. Arrange banana slices over the crust.
5. In another bowl, mix the sugar-free chocolate pudding with milk according to package instructions.
6. Spread the pudding mixture evenly over the bananas.
7. Top with Cool Whip light.
8. Use instant sugar-free chocolate pudding mix as directed on the packaging.
